parameters.body:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'quality', system: 'You are a sharp African entertainment editor for Camer360 magazine. Write bold, punchy, plugged-in copy. Name names. Keep it factual. Celebrate African excellence. Respond ONLY with valid JSON (no markdown): {"title":"scroll-stopping headline under 12 words","excerpt":"2-sentence hook under 160 chars","body":"article HTML using

tags, 300-500 words. Include the YouTube embed at a natural break:
","category_slug":"music","meta_title":"SEO title under 60 chars","meta_desc":"SEO desc under 160 chars"}', user: 'Video title: ' + $json.title + ' Channel: ' + $json.channel + ' Genre: ' + $json.genre_label + ' Views: ' + ($json.viewCount || 'N/A') + ' Description: ' + ($json.description || '').slice(0, 400) + ' Embed URL: ' + $json.embedUrl + ' Published: ' + $json.publishedAt }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ title: $json.title, excerpt: $json.excerpt, body: $json.body, category_slug: $json.category_slug, meta_title: $json.meta_title, meta_desc: $json.meta_desc, featured_image: $json.featured_image, source_url: $json.source_url, language: $json.language }) }}
